name: YummyusmentвҳҶMignon
desc: "Yummy" monsters you control gain 500 ATK for each LIGHT Beast monster on the field. You can only use each of the following effects of "YummyusmentвҳҶMignon" once per turn. If you control a Link-1 monster: You can target 1 Level 1 "Yummy" monster in your GY; Special Summon it. If this card is in your GY: You can target 2 "Yummy" monsters in your GY and/or banishment; place this card, and them, on the bottom of the Deck in any order.

action: Places itself from the player's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the player's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
Places the player's banished cards on the bottom of the Deck
